title: taraxacum cinnamomeum
intro: Taraxacum cinnamomeum, also known as golden dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be beneficial for treating conditions such as kidney stones and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum cinnamomeum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
